name: Egg Pizza Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine eggs, 3/4 cup pizza sauce, salt, pepper, basil, and oregano. Beat with a fork until the eggs are blended.
2. Heat a 6-inch skillet over medium-high heat. Add 1/2 teaspoon butter. When the butter is melted, pour in 1/4 cup of egg mixture.
3. As the eggs begin to set, lift the edges to allow liquid eggs to run under one side. Continue this until the eggs are fully set.
4. Slide the omelette out of the pan using a spatula. Repeat with the remaining egg mixture.
5. Cut the pita breads in half and lay them flat on the work surface. Place an omelette on each pita round.
6. Spread 1 tablespoon pizza sauce over each pita, sprinkle with cheese, arrange a few pieces of pepper and mushroom slices in a row, and sprinkle with cayenne pepper.
7. Fold the pita breads over tightly to roll them up. Serve immediately or wrap in plastic wrap and microwave on medium for 20 seconds to melt the cheese.
8. Roll-ups may be sliced and served as appetizers. To make ahead, wrap the roll-ups in plastic wrap and keep refrigerated. They can be served hot or cold. To reheat, place two roll-ups in a microwave oven and heat on medium until hot, about 30-45 seconds. Omelettes can be made ahead, wrapped individually, and stored in the refrigerator for up to 2 days or frozen.
